creator: kato@ganko.eps.nagoya-u.ac.jp
text:
kbyanc@freedomnet.com wrote:

> +	if((cpu_id & 0xFF) > 0x60) {   /* we already know it is a K6, just check the stepping

It is not neccessary to check stepping here.  All models of AMD K6
CPUs supports write allocate (from Implementation of wrte allocate in
the K86(TM) processors).
